claims_reviewed.claim: GEO Group profited $254 million off private detention last year (2025).
claims_reviewed.notes: Confirmed: GEO Group reported a company-record $254M profit in 2025, ~700% increase over 2024, driven by new ICE detention contracts. Source is GEO's own Q4/FY 2025 earnings release.

claims_reviewed.claim: ICE has lost in court 4,400 times for wrongfully detaining people since October.
claims_reviewed.notes: Confirmed: 4,421 cases ruled illegal by 400+ federal judges between October 2025 and mid-February 2026. Reuters review widely reported. Speaker said 4,400, exact figure 4,421.

summary: 2 claims reviewed: 2 supported, 0 uncertain. Both dollar/court figures match cited reports. Cleared for render.
